base_read.sql: SELECT ps.party_site_name AS PARTY_SITE_NAME, ps.party_site_id AS PARTY_SITE_ID FROM hz_party_sites ps WHERE ps.party_id = 300000047414569 AND ps.party_site_name LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-ADDR-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT NVL(i.party_site_name, i.party_site_name_new) AS PARTY_SITE_NAME, i.address_interface_id AS ADDRESS_INTERFACE_ID, (SELECT LISTAGG(CASE WHEN r.attribute IS NOT NULL THEN r.reject_lookup_code || ' [' || r.attribute || ']' ELSE r.reject_lookup_code END, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.rejection_id) FROM poz_supplier_int_rejections r WHERE r.parent_table = 'POZ_SUP_ADDRESSES_INT' AND r.parent_id = i.address_interface_id AND r.request_id = i.request_id) AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM poz_sup_addresses_int i WHERE i.load_request_id = :LRID
